hypothesis: Introducing 10–20 at% Zr into the La sublattice of LaH10-derived clathrates will stabilize non-integer La1−yZryHx phases with x = 12–14 at pressures at least 50 GPa lower than the corresponding binary LaHx while retaining superconducting transition temperatures ≥120 K, as verified by convex-hull stability and electron–phonon coupling calculations.
